Image.title: Image
Image.description: Metadata for an uploaded image used in the website.

url.description: The URL of the image stored in Cloudinary or Firebase Storage.

category.description: The section of the website this image belongs to.

title.description: A short title or description for the image.

order.description: The display order of the image.

uploadedBy.description: The UID of the admin who uploaded the image.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

/images/{imageId}.description: Collection of images for the website content.
